name: Do I qualify for free consult on AI referral malpractice in Seattle?

mainEntity.name: Do I qualify for free consult on AI referral malpractice in Seattle?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, most malpractice lawyers offer free evals nationwide. WA 3-year limit, AI competence required.[3] Factors: clear harm evidence. Search 'AI legal malpractice attorney'. No upfront cost typical.
